reviews.review_title: Please add this to Korean Store
reviews.review_description:
It's VERY nice Mafia game in VR.

It feels very similar to 'One Night Ultimate Werewolf' Board Game.

music and graphics are also very good.

Unfortunately, I'm korean and had to use VPN to get this although it's a FREE game.

This can be an Entry Barrier to VR newbies, who have no idea with vpn.

there were very few people inside(most of them were Japanese), so i had to gather 3 other korean to play just a single game.

Nevertheless, it was very fun. It was worth it.

I Hope this game is launched in Korean store. so that more people can notice and play this beautiful game. for now,  only few knows this.

You know, Many Korean LOVE to play Mafia game. 

and Quest2 just launched via domestic seller in Korea recently.

i think many KR Newbies would love to play this. thanks

----
2/23 seems like sound bug is fixed.

it would be nice if 6 or 7 players can play  together.

and more special Character!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
We're glad you're enjoying the game!
We are planning to release the Korean store in the near future.
We will release the Korean store soon and hope you will continue to play.

We've fixed the bug! We hope you will continue to let us know if anything goes wrong.

We'll consider adding more players to the game!

reviews.review_description:
vivid visuals are great!

can enjoy mafia game with only 4 people

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
We're looking into playing with more than four players in the future!

Thank you for your time!

Thanks for the review!
We'll keep making it better and better, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: This game is like Mafia game, and has a lot of potential. I hope my foreign friends also can play this game. Hope to see this game in foreign Oculus store. A lot of my friends want to play, but still waiting until quest store releases this at their countries.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the review!
I'm glad you're enjoying it as a VRmafia game.
We're working on expanding our store outside of Japan, so we'd love it if you'd spread the word to your friends!
We'll keep updating the game, so please keep playing!
